title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, delete models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; synchronous & async APIs, streaming support, embeddings.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chat, generation, and embeddings inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, embeddings, custom timeouts.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic client for chat, generate, pull, delete, list, copy, show.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, history, prompt templates, markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline GitHub Copilot-like assistant.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app backed by Ollama; demonstrates streaming chat via ollama-js.

title: ollama-hass
summary: Home Assistant custom integration exposing Ollama as conversation agent for local voice/text automations.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses in chat threads with role-based access.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducibly building & running Ollama and model bundles on NixOS.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and optional web UI on Kubernetes with GPU node support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that pipelines Ollama model serving inside CI for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: Lightweight FastAPI shim exposing OpenAI-style endpoints on top of Ollama for drop-in replacement.

title: ollama-ts
summary: Community TypeScript definitions and utilities extending the official ollama-js package.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, chat & embeddings, dependency injection ready.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot starter auto-configuring Ollama4j client beans for rapid Java backend integration.

title: awesome-ollama
summary: Curated list of tools, libraries, apps, tutorials, and model recipes for the Ollama ecosystem.
